title: None: valkey security, bug fix, and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.0.4-3]
- fix ImageMode: ensure ownership of /etc/valkey

[8.0.4-2]
- fix ImageMode: add tmpfiles.d entries for directories below /var

[8.0.4-1]
- rebase to 8.0.4 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-48367 and CVE-2025-32023

[8.0.3.1]
- rebase to 8.0.3

[8.0.2.1]
- rebase to 8.0.2
  Resolves: RHEL-73273

[7.2.6-2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[7.2.6.1]
- rebase to 7.2.6
- merge limit.conf in main service files
- drop /etc/sysconfig/valkey
- rename compat package
- fix working dir
- partially enable upstream test suite

[7.2.5-4]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[7.2.5-3]
- remove version_no_tilde code

[7.2.5-2]
- move redis compat symlinks to compat subpackage
full_text:
[8.0.4-3]
- fix ImageMode: ensure ownership of /etc/valkey

[8.0.4-2]
- fix ImageMode: add tmpfiles.d entries for directories below /var

[8.0.4-1]
- rebase to 8.0.4 for CVE-2025-27151 CVE-2025-48367 and CVE-2025-32023

[8.0.3.1]
- rebase to 8.0.3

[8.0.2.1]
- rebase to 8.0.2
  Resolves: RHEL-73273

[7.2.6-2]
- Bump release for October 2024 mass rebuild:
  Resolves: RHEL-64018

[7.2.6.1]
- rebase to 7.2.6
- merge limit.conf in main service files
- drop /etc/sysconfig/valkey
- rename compat package
- fix working dir
- partially enable upstream test suite

[7.2.5-4]
- Bump release for June 2024 mass rebuild

[7.2.5-3]
- remove version_no_tilde code

[7.2.5-2]
- move redis compat symlinks to compat subpackage

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20760.html
